records.question: Which departments are in the Whitman building that have at least one course, have at least one instructor named Wieland with a salary of at least 124651.41, and have at least one student with at most 99 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.building = 'Whitman' AND instructor.salary >= 124651.41 AND instructor.name = 'Wieland' AND student.tot_cred <= 99
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.dept_name FROM department AS T1 WHERE T1.building = 'Whitman' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course AS T2 WHERE T2.dept_name = T1.dept_name ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM instructor AS T3 WHERE T3.dept_name = T1.dept_name AND T3.name = 'Wieland' AND T3.salary >= 124651.41 ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM student AS T4 WHERE T4.dept_name = T1.dept_name AND T4.tot_cred <= 99 )

records.question: Which departments that have courses, instructors, and students have a budget of at most 406557.93?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.budget <= 406557.93
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.dept_name FROM department AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.dept_name = T2.dept_name JOIN instructor AS T3 ON T1.dept_name = T3.dept_name JOIN student AS T4 ON T1.dept_name = T4.dept_name WHERE T1.budget <= 406557.93 GROUP BY T1.dept_name

records.question: Which departments in the Mercer building have an instructor named Pimenta and also have enrolled students?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE instructor.name = 'Pimenta' AND department.building = 'Mercer'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.dept_name FROM department AS T1 INNER JOIN instructor AS T2 ON T1.dept_name = T2.dept_name WHERE T1.building = 'Mercer' AND T2.name = 'Pimenta' AND T1.dept_name IN ( SELECT DISTINCT dept_name FROM student WHERE dept_name IS NOT NULL )

records.question: Which departments have a budget of 573745.09, are located in Whitman, offer the Calculus course with 4 credits, and have a student named Szczerban with at most 97 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.name = 'Szczerban' AND course.credits = 4 AND department.budget = 573745.09 AND department.building = 'Whitman' AND course.title = 'Calculus' AND student.tot_cred <= 97
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.dept_name FROM department AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.dept_name = T2.dept_name INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.dept_name = T3.dept_name WHERE T1.budget = 573745.09 AND T1.building = 'Whitman' AND T2.title = 'Calculus' AND T2.credits = 4 AND T3.name = 'Szczerban' AND T3.tot_cred <= 97

records.question: Which departments are in the Taylor building that have an instructor named Pingr with a salary of at most 59303.62 and also have students with at most 95 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.building = 'Taylor' AND instructor.name = 'Pingr' AND student.tot_cred <= 95 AND instructor.salary <= 59303.62
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.dept_name FROM department AS T1 INNER JOIN instructor AS T2 ON T1.dept_name = T2.dept_name INNER JOIN student AS T3 ON T1.dept_name = T3.dept_name WHERE T1.building = 'Taylor' AND T2.name = 'Pingr' AND T2.salary <= 59303.62 AND T3.tot_cred <= 95

records.question: Which departments have a budget of at least 441840.92 that offer the 3-credit course titled Astronautics, have an instructor named Hau, and have a student named Ashmi with at most 95 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.budget >= 441840.92 AND course.credits = 3 AND student.tot_cred <= 95 AND instructor.name = 'Hau' AND student.name = 'Ashmi' AND course.title = 'Astronautics'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.dept_name FROM department AS T1 INNER JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.dept_name = T2.dept_name INNER JOIN instructor AS T3 ON T1.dept_name = T3.dept_name INNER JOIN student AS T4 ON T1.dept_name = T4.dept_name WHERE T1.budget >= 441840.92 AND T2.credits = 3 AND T2.title = 'Astronautics' AND T3.name = 'Hau' AND T4.name = 'Ashmi' AND T4.tot_cred <= 95
